          },
          {
            "text": "export async function createExamRequest(formData: FormData) {",

            "text": "  }",
            "lineNumber": 66
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 67
          },
          {
            "text": "  const { supabase, user } = await getAuthUser();",
            "lineNumber": 68
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 69
          },
          {
            "text": "  // 1. Create the exam_request (atendimento)",
            "lineNumber": 70
          },
          {
            "text": "  const { data: request, error: reqErr } = await supabase",
            "lineNumber": 71
          },
          {
            "text": "    .from(\"exam_requests\")",
            "lineNumber": 72
          },
          {
            "text": "    .insert({",
            "lineNumber": 73
          },
          {
            "text": "      user_id: user.id,",
            "lineNumber": 74
          },
          {
            "text": "      patient_id: parsed.data.patient_id,",
            "lineNumber": 75
          },
          {
            "text": "      unit_id: parsed.data.unit_id,",
            "lineNumber": 76
          },
          {
            "text": "      date: parsed.data.date ?? new Date().toISOString().split(\"T\")[0],",
            "lineNumber": 77
          },
          {
            "text": "      notes: parsed.data.notes,",
            "lineNumber": 78
          },
          {
            "text": "      status: \"pending\",",
            "lineNumber": 79
          },
          {
            "text": "    })",
            "lineNumber": 80
          },
          {
            "text": "    .select(\"id\")",
            "lineNumber": 81
          },
          {
            "text": "    .single();",
            "lineNumber": 82
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 83
          },
          {
            "text": "  if (reqErr || !request) return { error: reqErr?.message ?? \"Erro ao criar atendimento\" };",
            "lineNumber": 84
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 85
          },
          {
            "text": "  // 2. Create the exam_item (laudo) linked to template",
            "lineNumber": 86
          },
          {
            "text": "  const { data: item, error: itemErr } = await supabase",
            "lineNumber": 87
          },
          {
            "text": "    .from(\"exam_items\")",
            "lineNumber": 88
          },
          {
            "text": "    .insert({",
            "lineNumber": 89
          },
          {
            "text": "      user_id: user.id,",
            "lineNumber": 90
          },
          {
            "text": "      request_id: request.id,",
            "lineNumber": 91
          },
          {
            "text": "      template_id: parsed.data.template_id,",
            "lineNumber": 92
          },
          {
            "text": "      status: \"in_progress\",",
            "lineNumber": 93
          },
          {
            "text": "      form_snapshot: { variable_selections: {} } satisfies ExamFormSnapshot,",
            "lineNumber": 94
          },
          {
            "text": "    })",
            "lineNumber": 95
          },
          {
            "text": "    .select(\"id\")",
            "lineNumber": 96
          },
          {
            "text": "    .single();",
            "lineNumber": 97
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 98
          },
          {
            "text": "  if (itemErr || !item) return { error: itemErr?.message ?? \"Erro ao criar laudo\" };",
            "lineNumber": 99
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 100
          },
          {
            "text": "  // Update request status to in_progress",
            "lineNumber": 101
          },
          {
            "text": "  await supabase",
            "lineNumber": 102
          },
          {
            "text": "    .from(\"exam_requests\")",
            "lineNumber": 103
          },
          {
            "text": "    .update({ status: \"in_progress\" })",
            "lineNumber": 104
          },
          {
            "text": "    .eq(\"id\", request.id);",
            "lineNumber": 105
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 106
          },
          {
            "text": "  revalidatePath(\"/laudos\");",
            "lineNumber": 107
          },
          {
            "text": "  redirect(&#96;/laudos/${request.id}/${item.id}&#96;);",
            "lineNumber": 108
          },
          {
            "text": "}",
            "lineNumber": 109,
            "isSignature": true
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 110
          },
          {
            "text": "// ────── EXAM ITEMS ──────",

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 112
          },
          {
            "text": "/** Auto-save the exam item (draft). */",

          },
          {

          {
            "text": "export async function deleteExamTemplate(templateId: string) {",
            "lineNumber": 40,
            "isSignature": true
          },
          {
            "text": "  const { supabase, user } = await getAuthUser();",
            "lineNumber": 41

            "text": "  const { error } = await supabase",
            "lineNumber": 43
          },

          {
            "lineNumber": 48
          },
          {

            "lineNumber": 49
          },

            "lineNumber": 50

            "lineNumber": 51

          },

          },

          },

          {
            "text": "export async function saveExamTemplate(rawData: any, templateId?: string) {",
            "lineNumber": 14,
            "isSignature": true
          },
          {
            "text": "  const { supabase, user } = await getAuthUser();",
            "lineNumber": 15
          },
          {
            "text": "  ",
            "lineNumber": 16
          },
          {
            "text": "  const parsed = ExamTemplateSchema.safeParse(rawData);",
            "lineNumber": 17
          },
          {
            "text": "  if (!parsed.success) {",
            "lineNumber": 18
          },
          {
            "text": "    return { error: parsed.error.flatten().fieldErrors };",
            "lineNumber": 19
          },
          {
            "text": "  }",
            "lineNumber": 20
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 21
          },
          {
            "text": "  if (templateId) {",
            "lineNumber": 22
          },
          {
            "text": "    const { error } = await supabase",
            "lineNumber": 23
          },
          {
            "text": "      .from(\"exam_templates\")",
            "lineNumber": 24
          },
          {
            "text": "      .update(parsed.data)",
            "lineNumber": 25
          },
          {
            "text": "      .eq(\"id\", templateId)",
            "lineNumber": 26
          },
          {
            "text": "      .eq(\"user_id\", user.id);",
            "lineNumber": 27
          },
          {
            "text": "    if (error) return { error: error.message };",
            "lineNumber": 28
          },
          {
            "text": "  } else {",
            "lineNumber": 29
          },
          {
            "text": "    const { error } = await supabase",
            "lineNumber": 30
          },
          {
            "text": "      .from(\"exam_templates\")",
            "lineNumber": 31
          },
          {
            "text": "      .insert({ ...parsed.data, user_id: user.id });",
            "lineNumber": 32
          },
          {
            "text": "    if (error) return { error: error.message };",
            "lineNumber": 33
          },
          {
            "text": "  }",
            "lineNumber": 34
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 35
          },
          {
            "text": "  revalidatePath(\"/configuracoes/modelos\");",
            "lineNumber": 36
          },
          {
            "text": "  return { success: true };",
            "lineNumber": 37
          },
          {
            "text": "}",
            "lineNumber": 38,
            "isSignature": true
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 39
          },
          {
            "text": "export async function deleteExamTemplate(templateId: string) {",
            "lineNumber": 40,
            "isSignature": true

            "lineNumber": 41

            "text": "const UNIT_COOKIE = \"radflow_active_unit_id\"",

          },

            "text": "export default async function LaudosPage({searchParams}: PageProps) {",

          {
            "text": "  const {page: pageParam, status: statusParam, from: fromParam, to: toParam} = await searchParams",

            "text": "  if (itemErr || !item) return { error: itemErr?.message ?? \"Erro ao criar laudo\" };",

          },
          {
            "text": "  const { supabase, user } = await getAuthUser();",
            "lineNumber": 15
          },
          {
            "text": "  ",
            "lineNumber": 16
          },
          {
            "text": "  const parsed = ExamTemplateSchema.safeParse(rawData);",
            "lineNumber": 17
          },
          {
            "text": "  if (!parsed.success) {",
            "lineNumber": 18
          },
          {
            "text": "    return { error: parsed.error.flatten().fieldErrors };",
            "lineNumber": 19
          },
          {
            "text": "  }",
            "lineNumber": 20
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 21
          },
          {
            "text": "  if (templateId) {",
            "lineNumber": 22
          },
          {
            "text": "    const { error } = await supabase",
            "lineNumber": 23
          },
          {
            "text": "      .from(\"exam_templates\")",
            "lineNumber": 24
          },
          {
            "text": "      .update(parsed.data)",
            "lineNumber": 25
          },
          {
            "text": "      .eq(\"id\", templateId)",
            "lineNumber": 26
          },
          {
            "text": "      .eq(\"user_id\", user.id);",
            "lineNumber": 27
          },
          {
            "text": "    if (error) return { error: error.message };",
            "lineNumber": 28
          },
          {
            "text": "  } else {",
            "lineNumber": 29
          },
          {
            "text": "    const { error } = await supabase",
            "lineNumber": 30
          },
          {
            "text": "      .from(\"exam_templates\")",
            "lineNumber": 31
          },
          {
            "text": "      .insert({ ...parsed.data, user_id: user.id });",

          },
          {
            "text": "    if (error) return { error: error.message };",
            "lineNumber": 33
          },
          {
            "text": "  }",

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 35
          },
          {

          },

          },
          {
            "text": "export async function deleteExamTemplate(templateId: string) {",

      "codeBlock": {

        "signatures": {},
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "text": "/**",
            "lineNumber": 233
          },
          {
            "text": " * Creates/Updates a standalone snapshot of the report in the exam_reports table.",
            "lineNumber": 234
          },
          {
            "text": " * This mirror is used for future consultations independent of template changes.",
            "lineNumber": 235
          },
          {
            "text": " */",
            "lineNumber": 236
          },
          {
            "text": "async function upsertExamReport(itemId: string, providedSnapshot?: ExamFormSnapshot) {",
            "lineNumber": 237,
            "isSignature": true
          },
          {
            "text": "  const { supabase, user } = await getAuthUser();",
            "lineNumber": 238
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 239
          },
          {
            "text": "  // 1. Fetch full context for the snapshot",
            "lineNumber": 240
          },
          {
            "text": "  const { data: item } = await supabase",
            "lineNumber": 241
          },
          {
            "text": "    .from(\"exam_items\")",
            "lineNumber": 242
          },
          {
            "text": "    .select(&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 243
          },
          {
            "text": "      form_snapshot,",
            "lineNumber": 244
          },
          {
            "text": "      exam_templates ( title, technique, description, impression ),",
            "lineNumber": 245
          },
          {
            "text": "      exam_requests (",
            "lineNumber": 246
          },
          {
            "text": "        patient_id,",
            "lineNumber": 247
          },
          {
            "text": "        unit_id",
            "lineNumber": 248
          },
          {
            "text": "      )",
            "lineNumber": 249
          },
          {
            "text": "    &#96;)",
            "lineNumber": 250
          },
          {
            "text": "    .eq(\"id\", itemId)",
            "lineNumber": 251
          },
          {
            "text": "    .eq(\"user_id\", user.id)",
            "lineNumber": 252
          },
          {
            "text": "    .single();",
            "lineNumber": 253
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 254
          },
          {
            "text": "  if (!item || !item.exam_requests) return;",
            "lineNumber": 255
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 256
          },
          {
            "text": "  const snapshot = providedSnapshot || (item.form_snapshot as unknown as ExamFormSnapshot);",
            "lineNumber": 257
          },
          {
            "text": "  const template = item.exam_templates as any;",
            "lineNumber": 258
          },
          {
            "text": "  const request = item.exam_requests as any;",
            "lineNumber": 259
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 260
          },
          {
            "text": "  // Render content with template defaults if snapshot is missing sections",
            "lineNumber": 261
          },
          {
            "text": "  const content = generateReportHTML(snapshot, template);",
            "lineNumber": 262
          },
          {
            "text": "  const title = template?.title || \"LAUDO\";",
            "lineNumber": 263
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 264
          },
          {
            "text": "  // 2. Upsert the mirror record",
            "lineNumber": 265
          },
          {
            "text": "  await supabase",
            "lineNumber": 266
          },
          {
            "text": "    .from(\"exam_reports\")",
            "lineNumber": 267
          },
          {
            "text": "    .upsert({",
            "lineNumber": 268
          },
          {
            "text": "      exam_item_id: itemId,",
            "lineNumber": 269
          },
          {
            "text": "      user_id: user.id,",
            "lineNumber": 270
          },
          {
            "text": "      patient_id: request.patient_id,",
            "lineNumber": 271
          },
          {
            "text": "      unit_id: request.unit_id,",
            "lineNumber": 272
          },
          {
            "text": "      title: title,",
            "lineNumber": 273
          },
          {
            "text": "      content: content,",
            "lineNumber": 274
          },
          {
            "text": "      updated_at: new Date().toISOString(),",
            "lineNumber": 275
          },
          {
            "text": "    }, {",
            "lineNumber": 276
          },
          {
            "text": "      onConflict: \"exam_item_id\"",
            "lineNumber": 277
          },
          {
            "text": "    });",
            "lineNumber": 278
          },
          {
            "text": "}",
            "lineNumber": 279,
            "isSignature": true
          }
        ]

          },

          },

          {
            "text": "// ────── EXAM ITEMS ──────",
            "lineNumber": 111
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 112
          },
          {
            "text": "/** Auto-save the exam item (draft). */",
            "lineNumber": 113
          },
          {
            "text": "export async function saveExamItem(",
            "lineNumber": 114,
            "isSignature": true
          },
          {
            "text": "  itemId: string,",
            "lineNumber": 115,
            "isSignature": true
          },
          {

            "lineNumber": 116,
            "isSignature": true
          },
          {
            "text": ") {",
            "lineNumber": 117,
            "isSignature": true
          },
          {
            "text": "  const parsed = SaveExamItemSchema.safeParse(snapshot);",
            "lineNumber": 118
          },
          {
            "text": "  if (!parsed.success) return { error: \"Dados inválidos\" };",
            "lineNumber": 119
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 120
          },
          {
            "text": "  const { supabase, user } = await getAuthUser();",
            "lineNumber": 121
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 122
          },
          {
            "text": "  const formSnapshot: ExamFormSnapshot = {",
            "lineNumber": 123
          },
          {
            "text": "    technique: parsed.data.technique ?? undefined,",
            "lineNumber": 124
          },
          {
            "text": "    description: parsed.data.description ?? undefined,",
            "lineNumber": 125
          },
          {
            "text": "    impression: parsed.data.impression ?? undefined,",
            "lineNumber": 126
          },
          {
            "text": "    variable_selections: parsed.data.variable_selections,",
            "lineNumber": 127
          },
          {
            "text": "  };",
            "lineNumber": 128
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 129
          },
          {
            "text": "  const { error } = await supabase",
            "lineNumber": 130
          },
          {
            "text": "    .from(\"exam_items\")",
            "lineNumber": 131
          },
          {
            "text": "    .update({ form_snapshot: formSnapshot as unknown as Record&lt;string, unknown&gt;, status: \"in_progress\" })",
            "lineNumber": 132

Implementei a ação de duplicar modelo de exame. Resumo do que foi feito:

## Alterações

### 1. **ModelsClient.tsx**
- Import do ícone `Copy`
- Função `handleDuplicate`: cria uma cópia do modelo com todos os dados (título, unidade, técnica, descrição, impressão, variáveis, ativo), adiciona " (Cópia)" ao título e remove o `id` para indicar criação em vez de edição
- Botão "Duplicar" em cada card de modelo
- Grid de botões passando de 2 para 3 colunas (Editar | Duplicar | Excluir)

### 2. **ModelSheet.tsx**
- Uso de `template?.id` em vez de `template` para distinguir edição de criação
- Quando há template sem `id` (duplicação), o sheet se comporta como "Novo Modelo" (título e botão de cadastrar)

## Fluxo

1. O usuário clica em "Duplicar" em um modelo
2. O sheet abre com os dados preenchidos
3. O título recebe " (Cópia)"
4. O usuário pode alterar e salvar
5. A ação de salvar cria um novo registro (sem `id`)
6. `revalidatePath` atualiza a lista de modelos

A duplicação preserva técnicas, descrições, impressões e variáveis dinâmicas do modelo original.
